notes: Agent-managed repo contract for yoyo itself.
Use this file to persist recurring repo context instead of re-prompting style, framework, and command choices.

style_rules: Prefer engine fixes over presentation-layer workarounds.
Use a dedicated git worktree for repo write tasks.
If src changes, cargo test must pass before commit.
Dogfood yoyo when yoyo tools fit the task.
Rust for core product code, Go for tooling and automation, Zig for low-level fit.
Do not add Python to this project.
